title: Destroy uniform of apparel by pocket patch
content: Defect: Destroy uniform of apparel by patchCause: design flaw, and no anyone knows and point out this issue before mass production.Solution: as I always emphasized: every pc of pre-production sample must be integrity and full test before mass production without missing any tiny process, then you will find some even negligible issues, like this one, many missed that: the pocket should also be printed align with cloth to make it uniform, but not like the pocket was patched forcedly after cloth finished. No way to rework after mass production, may cut client’s Logo label and sell as cheap stock.Typical: * * *Rework difficulty: * * * * *Rework collateral risk: * * * * *
